title: psychotria dubia var. dubia
intro: Psychotria dubia var. dubia, also known as the 'Dubia' or 'Kadupul' plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a climbing shrub native to Sri Lanka, widely used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential antidiabetic and anticancer properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the Psychotria dubia var. dubia plant are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or made into extracts and tinctures for medicinal use.
